Of false information on voter decisions and opinions. Our findings are alarming: a well-crafted fake news article can significantly influence public perception of a political candidate.

Case in point: recent studies show that a majority of Americans believe that their political candidates are corrupt, which has led to a deep mistrust of government institutions. This presents an opportunity for those seeking to spread misinformation to sway public opinion and manipulate election outcomes.
